<h3>Hello!</h3>
<h5>I'm Taima</h5>
	
<p>
I’m an attorney by day and a travel blogger by night.  I know the feeling of limited time and money, but I've discovered how to defy those constraints.
<br/><br/>
While working full-time, I've explored 40+ countries across 5 continents, mastering time management, budgeting, and creating unforgettable experiences along the way.  
<br/><br/>
Now, I want to share my experiences and practical advice with you. Here you will find  valuable tips, from planning seamless trips to finding ways to afford it. (I did the work so you don’t have to).
<br/><br/>
Join me on an incredible journey of appreciating the day to day while embracing a life of travel, style, and personal growth. Welcome to 'Poor In A Private Plane’.
	</p>
	
<a class="button"
href="https://www.poorinaprivateplane.com/aboutme"> Read More About Taima</a>
	
</div></div></div></section>

itemprop="datePublished" datetime="2025-08-27T15:05:57-04:00"></time></p><h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a class="entry-title-link" rel="bookmark" href="https://www.poorinaprivateplane.com/visiting-joshua-tree/">Visiting Joshua Tree: Your No-BS Guide for First-Timers (What to See, Pack, and Where to Hang Out)</a></h2>

<br> <br> </header><div class="entry-content" itemprop="text"><p>Ever wonder what it's like visiting Joshua Tree? My first trip was in late spring, which, heads up, can be a scorcher, even if the wildflowers are (briefly) blooming. Like so many, I first saw photos of Joshua Tree's surreal boulders and twisty trees all over social media. 

The place looked unreal ...</p><p><a class="more-link" href="https://www.poorinaprivateplane.com/visiting-joshua-tree/">Read the Post</a></p></p></div><footer class="entry-footer"></footer></article><div class="archive-pagination pagination"><ul><li class="active" ><a href="https://www.poorinaprivateplane.com/" aria-current="page">1</a></li>

					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {

								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {

					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
